case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. MORENA FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MORENA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2011
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $394.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MORENA
